title: IIFL Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIFL Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIFL Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IIFL Finance:
IIFL Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance!
